name: obsidian
description: Obsidian vault workflows (notes/markdown/diagrams/canvas) + LLM wiki layer. ⚠️ defuddle needs CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Obsidian vault workflows — notes, diagrams, canvas, plus an LLM wiki layer
interface.longDescription: Manage Obsidian vaults end-to-end: author Flavored Markdown / Bases / Canvas, generate Mermaid and Excalidraw diagrams, run daily notes and file-intel summaries via the Obsidian CLI, and maintain an incremental LLM wiki layer (wiki-setup/ingest/cross-linker/query/lint/merge) with SHA-256 delta tracking. using-obsidian routes the skills.
defaultPrompt: Create a note in my Obsidian vault.
Make a Mermaid diagram for this workflow.
Ingest my new notes into the wiki layer.
